ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "program_eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the stream */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program that the stream belongs to */,
  "stream_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota */,
  "quota_name" TEXT /* Name of the quota */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quota */,
  "quota_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the quota */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota that the category belongs to */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "reserved_percentage" INTEGER /* Reserved percentage for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission statistic */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stream */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., opening rank, closing rank, cutoff marks) */,
  "statistic_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the statistics are applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_statistics_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_statistics_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_statistics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_statistics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the applicant */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota the applicant is applying under */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the applicant is applying under */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the applicant applied */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the applicant applied to */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stream the applicant applied to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, reviewed, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the application status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seat_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat allocation */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stream */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "allocated_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats allocated */,
  "allocated_seats_male" INTEGER /* Number of seats allocated for male candidates */,
  "allocated_seats_female" INTEGER /* Number of seats allocated for female candidates */,
  "allocated_seats_others" INTEGER /* Number of seats allocated for other categories */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the allocation is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seat_allocations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seat_allocations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seat_allocations_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seat_allocations_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission result */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision of the admission (e.g., accepted, rejected, waitlisted) */,
  "result_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the admission decision */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the admission decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_results_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
